frontmatter.title: 練習問題メモ 6（正則行列）

children.html: nnn
AAA
A−1A=AA−1=IA^{-1}A = AA^{-1} = IA−1A=AA−1=I
A−1A^{-1}A−1
AAA

children.value: また、正則行列であるための必要十分条件は

children.html: det⁡(A)≠0\operatorname{det}(A) \neq 0det(A)=0

children.value: 2.次の(ア)、(イ)の正則行列の逆行列を求めよ。

children.html: (ア) (1ab01c001) (イ) (111112121)\text { (ア) }\left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & a & b \\ 0 & 1 & c \\ 0 & 0 & 1 \end{array}\right) \quad \text { (イ) }\left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 2 \\ 1 & 2 & 1 \end{array}\right) (ア) ⎝⎛​100​a10​bc1​⎠⎞​ (イ) ⎝⎛​111​112​121​⎠⎞​

children.value: 解法1. 逆行列の定義から余因子行列を求めて解く

children.html: A=(1ab01c001)A = \left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & a & b \\ 0 & 1 & c \\ 0 & 0 & 1 \end{array}\right)A=⎝⎛​100​a10​bc1​⎠⎞​
A−1=1∣A∣A~A^{-1} = \frac{1}{|A|} \tilde{A}A−1=∣A∣1​A~
A~\tilde{A}A~

children.value: なので、行列式と余因子行列を求めていく。

|A| = 1^3 + a \cdot c \cdot 0 + 0 \cdot 0 \cdot b
    - 1 \cdot c \cdot 0 - a \cdot 0 \cdot 1 - b \cdot 1 \cdot 0\\
    = 1
children.html: ∣A∣=13+a⋅c⋅0+0⋅0⋅b−1⋅c⋅0−a⋅0⋅1−b⋅1⋅0=1|A| = 1^3 + a \cdot c \cdot 0 + 0 \cdot 0 \cdot b - 1 \cdot c \cdot 0 - a \cdot 0 \cdot 1 - b \cdot 1 \cdot 0\\ = 1∣A∣=13+a⋅c⋅0+0⋅0⋅b−1⋅c⋅0−a⋅0⋅1−b⋅1⋅0=1

A11~=(−1)1+1∣A11∣=1×1=1A12~=(−1)1+2∣A12∣=−1×0=0A13~=(−1)1+3∣A13∣=1×0=0A21~=(−1)2+1∣A21∣=−1×a=−aA22~=(−1)2+2∣A22∣=1×1=1A23~=(−1)2+3∣A23∣=−1×0=0A31~=(−1)3+1∣A31∣=1×(ac−b)=ac−bA32~=(−1)3+2∣A32∣=−1×c=−cA33~=(−1)3+3∣A33∣=1×1=1\begin{align} \tilde{A_{11}} &= (-1)^{1+1} |A_{11}| = 1 \times 1 = 1\\ \tilde{A_{12}} &= (-1)^{1+2} |A_{12}| = -1 \times 0 = 0\\ \tilde{A_{13}} &= (-1)^{1+3} |A_{13}| = 1 \times 0 = 0\\ \tilde{A_{21}} &= (-1)^{2+1} |A_{21}| = -1 \times a = -a\\ \tilde{A_{22}} &= (-1)^{2+2} |A_{22}| = 1 \times 1 = 1\\ \tilde{A_{23}} &= (-1)^{2+3} |A_{23}| = -1 \times 0 = 0\\ \tilde{A_{31}} &= (-1)^{3+1} |A_{31}| = 1 \times (ac-b) = ac-b\\ \tilde{A_{32}} &= (-1)^{3+2} |A_{32}| = -1 \times c = -c\\ \tilde{A_{33}} &= (-1)^{3+3} |A_{33}| = 1 \times 1 = 1\\ \end{align}A11​~​A12​~​A13​~​A21​~​A22​~​A23​~​A31​~​A32​~​A33​~​​=(−1)1+1∣A11​∣=1×1=1=(−1)1+2∣A12​∣=−1×0=0=(−1)1+3∣A13​∣=1×0=0=(−1)2+1∣A21​∣=−1×a=−a=(−1)2+2∣A22​∣=1×1=1=(−1)2+3∣A23​∣=−1×0=0=(−1)3+1∣A31​∣=1×(ac−b)=ac−b=(−1)3+2∣A32​∣=−1×c=−c=(−1)3+3∣A33​∣=1×1=1​​
A−1=1×A~=(1−aac−b01−c001)A^{-1} = 1 \times \tilde{A} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & -a & ac-b\\ 0 & 1 & -c\\ 0 & 0 & 1 \end{pmatrix}A−1=1×A~=⎝⎛​100​−a10​ac−b−c1​⎠⎞​

A−1A=(1−aac−b01−c001)(1ab01c001)=(1a−ab−ac+(ac−b)01c−c001)=(100010001)A^{-1} A = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & -a & ac-b\\ 0 & 1 & -c\\ 0 & 0 & 1 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} 1 & a & b \\ 0 & 1 & c \\ 0 & 0 & 1 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & a - a & b - ac + (ac-b)\\ 0 & 1 & c - c\\ 0 & 0 & 1\\ \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 0 & 0\\ 0 & 1 & 0\\ 0 & 0 & 1\\ \end{pmatrix}A−1A=⎝⎛​100​−a10​ac−b−c1​⎠⎞​⎝⎛​100​a10​bc1​⎠⎞​=⎝⎛​100​a−a10​b−ac+(ac−b)c−c1​⎠⎞​=⎝⎛​100​010​001​⎠⎞​

children.value: 解法2. 行基本変形で解く

children.html: (ア∣E)=(1ab10001c010001001)(ア | E) = \left( \begin{array}{ccc|ccc} 1 & a & b & 1 & 0 & 0\\ 0 & 1 & c & 0 & 1 & 0\\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 \end{array} \right)(ア∣E)=⎝⎛​100​a10​bc1​100​010​001​⎠⎞​
−b-b−b
(1a010−b01c010001001)\left( \begin{array}{ccc|ccc} 1 & a & 0 & 1 & 0 & -b\\ 0 & 1 & c & 0 & 1 & 0\\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 \end{array} \right)⎝⎛​100​a10​0c1​100​010​−b01​⎠⎞​
−c-c−c
(1a010−b01001−c001001)\left( \begin{array}{ccc|ccc} 1 & a & 0 & 1 & 0 & -b\\ 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 & -c\\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 \end{array} \right)⎝⎛​100​a10​001​100​010​−b−c1​⎠⎞​
−a-a−a

(1001−aac−b01001−c001001)=(E∣ア−1)\left( \begin{array}{ccc|ccc} 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 & -a & ac-b\\ 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 & -c\\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 & 1 \end{array} \right) = (E | ア^{-1})⎝⎛​100​010​001​100​−a10​ac−b−c1​⎠⎞​=(E∣ア−1)
A=(111112121)A = \left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 2 \\ 1 & 2 & 1 \end{array}\right)A=⎝⎛​111​112​121​⎠⎞​
∣A∣=13+12×2+12×2−1×22−13−13=1+2+2−4−1−1=−1|A| = 1^3 + 1^2 \times 2 + 1^2 \times 2 - 1 \times 2^2 - 1^3 - 1^3\\ = 1 + 2 + 2 - 4 - 1 - 1\\ = -1∣A∣=13+12×2+12×2−1×22−13−13=1+2+2−4−1−1=−1

A~11=(−1)1+1∣A11∣=1×(12−22)=−3A~12=(−1)1+2∣A12∣=−1×(1−2)=1A~13=(−1)1+3∣A13∣=1×(2−1)=1A~21=(−1)2+1∣A21∣=−1×(1−2)=1A~22=(−1)2+2∣A22∣=1×(1−1)=0A~23=(−1)2+3∣A23∣=−1×(2−1)=−1A~31=(−1)3+1∣A31∣=1×(2−1)=1A~32=(−1)3+2∣A32∣=−1×(2−1)=−1A~33=(−1)3+3∣A33∣=1×(1−1)=0\begin{align} \tilde{A}_{11} = (-1)^{1+1} |A_{11}| = 1 \times (1^2 - 2^2) = -3\\ \tilde{A}_{12} = (-1)^{1+2} |A_{12}| = -1 \times (1 - 2) = 1\\ \tilde{A}_{13} = (-1)^{1+3} |A_{13}| = 1 \times (2 - 1) = 1\\ \tilde{A}_{21} = (-1)^{2+1} |A_{21}| = -1 \times (1 - 2) = 1\\ \tilde{A}_{22} = (-1)^{2+2} |A_{22}| = 1 \times (1 - 1) = 0\\ \tilde{A}_{23} = (-1)^{2+3} |A_{23}| = -1 \times (2 - 1) = -1\\ \tilde{A}_{31} = (-1)^{3+1} |A_{31}| = 1 \times (2 - 1) = 1\\ \tilde{A}_{32} = (-1)^{3+2} |A_{32}| = -1 \times (2 - 1) = -1\\ \tilde{A}_{33} = (-1)^{3+3} |A_{33}| = 1 \times (1 - 1) = 0\\ \end{align}A~11​=(−1)1+1∣A11​∣=1×(12−22)=−3A~12​=(−1)1+2∣A12​∣=−1×(1−2)=1A~13​=(−1)1+3∣A13​∣=1×(2−1)=1A~21​=(−1)2+1∣A21​∣=−1×(1−2)=1A~22​=(−1)2+2∣A22​∣=1×(1−1)=0A~23​=(−1)2+3∣A23​∣=−1×(2−1)=−1A~31​=(−1)3+1∣A31​∣=1×(2−1)=1A~32​=(−1)3+2∣A32​∣=−1×(2−1)=−1A~33​=(−1)3+3∣A33​∣=1×(1−1)=0​​
A~=(−31110−11−10)\tilde{A} = \begin{pmatrix} -3 & 1 & 1\\ 1 & 0 & -1\\ 1 & -1 & 0 \end{pmatrix}A~=⎝⎛​−311​10−1​1−10​⎠⎞​
A−1=1∣A∣A~=−A~=(3−1−1−101−110)A^{-1} = \frac{1}{|A|} \tilde{A} = - \tilde{A} = \begin{pmatrix} 3 & -1 & -1\\ -1 & 0 & 1\\ -1 & 1 & 0 \end{pmatrix}A−1=∣A∣1​A~=−A~=⎝⎛​3−1−1​−101​−110​⎠⎞​

の公式を参考にすると

children.html: A−1=(A11−1+A11−1A12A22−1OA11−1−A11−1A12A22−1−A22−1OA11−1A22−1)=(A11−1−A11−1A12A22−1OA22−1)A^{-1} = \begin{pmatrix} A_{11}^{-1} + A_{11}^{-1} A_{12} A_{22}^{-1} O A_{11}^{-1} & -A_{11}^{-1} A_{12} A_{22}^{-1}\\ -A_{22}^{-1} O A_{11}^{-1} & A_{22}^{-1} \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} A_{11}^{-1} & -A_{11}^{-1} A_{12} A_{22}^{-1}\\ O & A_{22}^{-1} \end{pmatrix}A−1=(A11−1​+A11−1​A12​A22−1​OA11−1​−A22−1​OA11−1​​−A11−1​A12​A22−1​A22−1​​)=(A11−1​O​−A11−1​A12​A22−1​A22−1​​)

children.value: 行列もスカラーと同様に分配法則があるので

children.html: (En−A)(En+A+A2+⋯+Am−1)=En+A+A2+⋯+Am−1−(A+A2+⋯+Am)=En−Am\begin{align} (E_n - A)(E_n+A+A^2+\cdots+A^{m-1}) &= E_n + A + A^2 + \cdots + A^{m-1} - (A + A^2 + \cdots + A^{m})\\ &= E_n - A^{m} \end{align}(En​−A)(En​+A+A2+⋯+Am−1)​=En​+A+A2+⋯+Am−1−(A+A2+⋯+Am)=En​−Am​​

children.value: べき零行列のトレースは0
固有値の和はトレースと一致する
トレースは対角成分の和 → べき零行列は対角成分が0
